steps.title: Analyze the slope direction
steps.content: Graph all four answer choices in Desmos and overlay them on the line of best fit. The displayed line slopes downward, so the model needs a negative slope, and it crosses the y-axis near $2.3$.

steps.title: Identify the y-intercept
steps.content:
Reading where the line crosses the y-axis at $x = 0$, the $y$-value is approximately 2.3.
  • Choice B has y-intercept 16.3 — far too large
  • Choice D has y-intercept 2.3 — matches the graph
Verify with $x = 2$: the equation $y = -(2) + 2.3 = 0.3$ matches the line's position.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
